projects.title: Shared RAG Platform
projects.subtitle: Reusable knowledge tools for Huntington
projects.description: Saved 1.5M+ per year by leading full development of a reusable enterprise RAG agent framework supporting 5 internal AI projects, powering tools used by tens of thousands of colleagues.
projects.extendedDescription: Lead the development of reusable AWS infrastructure for retrieval, indexing, agent configuration, memory, reranked search, logging, and LangFuse monitoring. The system supports policy search, onboarding, HR knowledge, vendor search, and call center help.
projects.impact: Supports tools used by tens of thousands of colleagues across 5 internal AI projects.

projects.title: Customer Insights Chatbot
projects.subtitle: In development for mobile and web
projects.description: Led customer-facing (10M+) cross-cloud (AWS + GCP) AI solution for personalized financial insights and agentic financial assistant chatbots that connect to customer data.
projects.extendedDescription: Designed a system that aggregates customer data nightly, generates structured prompts, and serves insights through AWS data systems and GCP inference. Filed a patent-in-process concept for prompt pre-generation using SQL, Snowflake, Athena, S3, Glue, and Cloud Run.
projects.impact: Lays groundwork for AI features across mobile and web banking.

projects.title: AI Training and Automation
projects.subtitle: Helping teams use AI well
projects.description: Mentored 200+ engineers through AI coding-agent workflow presentations and educated 100+ executives on AI efficiency through hands-on workshops.
projects.extendedDescription: Introduced modern AI coding tools to the data science team and helped others adopt them. Delivered presentations to hundreds of colleagues, wrote guidance for Copilot, Claude Code, OpenCode, Codex, and chatbots, and translated AI use for technical and non-technical audiences.
projects.impact: Turned individual AI know-how into team practice through mentoring, docs, and presentations.

projects.title: Agent Skills Repo
projects.subtitle: Reusable team knowledge
projects.description: Own a repo that captures team knowledge so data scientists can reuse it with AI agents.
projects.extendedDescription: Built and maintain a repository for repeatable domain knowledge and implementation guidance. It helps data scientists move from one-off prompting to reusable instructions.
projects.impact: Helps data scientists reuse team knowledge instead of rebuilding prompts from scratch.

projects.title: AI Deployments
projects.subtitle: Robust, scalable AI application deployments
projects.description: Deployed scalable AI applications across nonprod, QA, and production using Docker, Terraform, Kubernetes, AWS ECR, Azure DevOps, and GitHub pipelines
projects.extendedDescription: Utilized CI/CD pipelines, cybersecurity authorization and authentication practices, robust monitoring and reporting on AI systems, and production support.
projects.impact: Ensured constant monitoring and full functioning deployment of production AI apps.
